name: Grill Chicken with Havana Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients for the sauce.
2. Mix well and cover. Refrigerate overnight.
3. Heat an outdoor grill and let the sauce come to room temperature.
4. Sprinkle the chicken with lime juice and season with salt and pepper as desired.
5. Place on the grill and cook for about 6 minutes per side or until browned.
6. Brush the sauce over the chicken throughout grilling.
7. Top each piece with more sauce when serving.
FROM: KATHLEEN ALAM (VFXR40B)
